---
title: "Awards & Funding"
format: html
---

```{=html}
<div class="award-entry">
  <div class="award-year">2019</div>
  <div class="award-body">
    <div class="award-title">Best Student Presentation</div>
    <div class="award-venue">University of Aberdeen</div>
    <div class="award-desc">Travelling waves as a form of spatio-temporal asynchrony</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="award-entry">
  <div class="award-year">2019</div>
  <div class="award-body">
    <div class="award-title">Best Presentation</div>
    <div class="award-venue">Iberian Vole Workshop, Porto</div>
    <div class="award-desc">Spatio-temporal asynchrony in a cyclic vole species</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="award-entry">
  <div class="award-year">2017</div>
  <div class="award-body">
    <div class="award-title">Sir Maitland Mackie Scholarship</div>
    <div class="award-venue">University of Aberdeen</div>
    <div class="award-desc">Funding for agricultural research</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="award-entry">
  <div class="award-year">2016</div>
  <div class="award-body">
    <div class="award-title">Outstanding BSc Zoology Student</div>
    <div class="award-venue">University of Aberdeen</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="award-entry">
  <div class="award-year">2016</div>
  <div class="award-body">
    <div class="award-title">People's Trust Internship</div>
    <div class="award-venue">PTES</div>
    <div class="award-desc">Funded research position following BSc thesis</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="award-entry">
  <div class="award-year">2015</div>
  <div class="award-body">
    <div class="award-title">Carnegie Summer Scholarship</div>
    <div class="award-desc">Supported BSc data collection</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

[$\leftarrow$ Back to CV Overview](cv.qmd)
